title: Count Square Submatrices with All Ones
titleCn: 统计全为 1 的正方形子矩阵

testcases.input: matrix = [   [0,1,1,1],   [1,1,1,1],   [0,1,1,1] ] Output: 15 Explanation: There are 10 squares of side 1. There are 4 squares of side 2. There is 1 square of side 3. Total number of squares = 10 + 4 + 1 = 15.
testcases.expectedOutput: 15 Explanation: There are 10 squares of side 1. There are 4 squares of side 2. There is 1 square of side 3. Total number of squares = 10 + 4 + 1 = 15.

testcases.input: matrix = [ [1,0,1], [1,1,0], [1,1,0] ] Output: 7 Explanation: There are 6 squares of side 1. There is 1 square of side 2. Total number of squares = 6 + 1 = 7.
testcases.expectedOutput: 7 Explanation: There are 6 squares of side 1. There is 1 square of side 2. Total number of squares = 6 + 1 = 7.
